page: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-88-lssd is a general-purpose virtual machine configured with 88 vCPUs and 352 GB of RAM. The underlying hardware features an Intel Xeon 8481C processor operating at 2.7 GHz, providing 44 physical cores with 2.0 threads per core on an x86_64 architecture. This server includes 6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage distributed across 16 local SSDs, but does not contain any GPU accelerators.

Benchmark results show strong multi-core performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 73268.7 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 18439.0. Single-core performance is moderate, as indicated by a Geekbench single-core score of 1724.0. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 5995.54 GB/sec for cached small block reads and 224.79 GB/sec for uncached large block reads. The server also demonstrates top-tier capabilities in image processing and prompt processing for small language models, achieving 3879.32 tokens per second on a 135M model.

The high density of local NVMe storage combined with a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio offers qualitative cost efficiency for resource-intensive workloads that require high-speed local caching or scratch space. However, the lack of GPU acceleration limits its utility for heavy deep learning training, though it remains capable of CPU-based LLM inference. This configuration is suitable for database operations, software compilation, static web serving, and data processing tasks.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-88-lssd is a general-purpose server featuring 88 dedicated vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8481C processor running at 2.7 GHz, paired with 352 GB of RAM. It includes a substantial local storage configuration of 6432 GB across 16 NVMe SSDs, while omitting GPU hardware. Benchmarks indicate strong multi-core capabilities, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 73268.7 and a Passmark CPU score of 73489.6. Memory performance is robust, showing uncached read bandwidth of 224.79 GB/sec. The server delivers top-tier performance in image processing and prompt processing for small language models, alongside strong database operations at 29774.57 on Passmark. This hardware profile is optimized for workloads requiring high-speed local storage and significant parallel processing, such as database systems, software compilation, and CPU-based inference.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-88-lssd is an x86_64 server with 88 vCPUs, 352 GB RAM, and 6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. It delivers strong multi-core performance and high memory bandwidth for database workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-88-lssd features 88 vCPUs, 352 GB RAM, and 6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage for database and multi-core workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity x86_64 server combining eighty-eight dedicated vCPUs with over six terabytes of local NVMe SSD storage for parallel workloads.
bullet_points: 88 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs with 352 GB of RAM
6432 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage across 16 drives
Strong multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth benchmark results
Top-tier performance in image processing and small-model prompt processing
Suitable for database operations, software compilation, and web serving
